tasks.subject: Task 0: Repo-Scaffold
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Projektstruktur, Git-Init, .gitignore, requirements.txt, Stub-README.

**Files:**
- Create: .gitignore, fetcher/requirements.txt, fetcher/__init__.py, tests/__init__.py, tests/fixtures/.gitkeep, docs/.gitkeep, docs/avatars/.gitkeep, README.md

**Verify:** pip install -r fetcher/requirements.txt && pytest → no errors

```json:metadata
{"files": [".gitignore", "fetcher/requirements.txt", "README.md"], "verifyCommand": "pip install -r fetcher/requirements.txt && pytest", "acceptanceCriteria": ["directory structure created", "pip install works", "pytest runs clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: JSON-Schema-Fixture
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Beispiel reviews.json + places_response_sample.json als Fixtures, validate_reviews_json Validator.

**Files:**
- Create: tests/fixtures/reviews_sample.json, tests/fixtures/places_response_sample.json, fetcher/schema.py, tests/test_schema.py

**Verify:** pytest tests/test_schema.py -v → 3+ PASS

```json:metadata
{"files": ["fetcher/schema.py", "tests/test_schema.py", "tests/fixtures/reviews_sample.json", "tests/fixtures/places_response_sample.json"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tests/test_schema.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["reviews_sample.json valid", "validator raises on missing keys", "tests green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Places API Client
tasks.description:
**Goal:** fetcher/places_api.py ruft Places API (New), Tests mit Mock.

**Files:**
- Create: fetcher/places_api.py, tests/test_places_api.py

**Verify:** pytest tests/test_places_api.py -v → 2+ PASS

```json:metadata
{"files": ["fetcher/places_api.py", "tests/test_places_api.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tests/test_places_api.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["fetch_place sets correct headers", "HTTP error raises RuntimeError"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Normalizer
tasks.description:
**Goal:** fetcher/normalize.py transformiert Places-Response → reviews.json Schema.

**Files:**
- Create: fetcher/normalize.py, tests/test_normalize.py

**Verify:** pytest tests/test_normalize.py -v → 4+ PASS

```json:metadata
{"files": ["fetcher/normalize.py", "tests/test_normalize.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tests/test_normalize.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["output passes validate_reviews_json", "German month names in date_display", "missing photoUri → None"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Avatar-Cache
tasks.description:
**Goal:** fetcher/avatar_cache.py lädt Avatare idempotent herunter nach docs/avatars/.

**Files:**
- Create: fetcher/avatar_cache.py, tests/test_avatar_cache.py

**Verify:** pytest tests/test_avatar_cache.py -v → 4+ PASS

```json:metadata
{"files": ["fetcher/avatar_cache.py", "tests/test_avatar_cache.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tests/test_avatar_cache.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["downloads and stores by sha1 hash", "idempotent", "None on HTTP error"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Fetch-Orchestrator
tasks.description:
**Goal:** fetcher/fetch.py bindet Phase-1 zusammen, business_api.py als Phase-2-Stub.

**Files:**
- Create: fetcher/fetch.py, fetcher/business_api.py, tests/test_fetch.py

**Verify:** pytest tests/test_fetch.py -v → 3+ PASS

```json:metadata
{"files": ["fetcher/fetch.py", "fetcher/business_api.py", "tests/test_fetch.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tests/test_fetch.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["writes valid reviews.json", "missing env → SystemExit", "REVIEWS_SOURCE=business raises NotImplementedError"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Widget-CSS
tasks.description:
**Goal:** docs/widget.css mit Header, Slider, Card, Modal, Responsive, Skeleton, a11y.

**Files:**
- Create: docs/widget.css

**Verify:** Manuelle Browser-Vorschau (erst nach Task 7 sinnvoll)

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/widget.css"], "verifyCommand": "python -m http.server 8000 --directory docs", "acceptanceCriteria": ["scroll-snap slider", "responsive breakpoints 1024/768", "skeleton pulse animation", "prefers-reduced-motion respected"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Widget-JS
tasks.description:
**Goal:** docs/widget.js holt reviews.json, rendert, bindet Slider + Modal.

**Files:**
- Create: docs/widget.js, docs/index.html

**Verify:** python -m http.server 8000 --directory docs → Widget rendert mit reviews_sample.json

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/widget.js", "docs/index.html"], "verifyCommand": "python -m http.server 8000 --directory docs", "acceptanceCriteria": ["renders into #ffs-google-reviews", "hides on error", "keyboard navigation works", "modal opens on card click"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: GitHub Actions Workflow
tasks.description:
**Goal:** .github/workflows/fetch.yml — täglicher Cron, commit-if-changed.

**Files:**
- Create: .github/workflows/fetch.yml

**Verify:** Nach Push + manueller workflow_dispatch → grüner Run

```json:metadata
{"files": [".github/workflows/fetch.yml"], "verifyCommand": "(manual) GitHub Actions → Run workflow", "acceptanceCriteria": ["daily cron configured", "commits only on change", "uses contents:write permission"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: README + Dokumentation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** README erklärt Setup, Entwicklung, Phase-2-Umschaltung, Duda-Einbettung, Troubleshooting.

**Files:**
- Modify: README.md

**Verify:** cat README.md | head -40 → sinnvoll

```json:metadata
{"files": ["README.md"], "verifyCommand": "cat README.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["all sections present", "commands copy-pasteable", "links to spec + plan"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: GitHub-Setup (interaktiv)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** GitHub-Repo + Pages + Secret konfiguriert, erster Action-Run grün, echte reviews.json live.

**Files:** keine (Konfiguration auf GitHub)

**Verify:** curl -sI https://firefly1502.github.io/rezensionintegrator/reviews.json → HTTP/2 200

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "curl -sI https://firefly1502.github.io/rezensionintegrator/reviews.json", "acceptanceCriteria": ["repo public on GitHub", "Pages active from /docs", "GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY secret set", "first workflow run green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: Duda-Einbettung (build-only)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Widget auf versteckter Duda-Testseite eingebaut und getestet.

**Files:** keine (Duda-Konfiguration)

**Verify:** Browser auf https://www.fullflightsim.de/widget-test zeigt Widget

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "(manual) Browser check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["widget renders on Duda test page", "responsive OK", "modal works", "page noindex"]}
```
